name: localized_color_focus
description: Highlights visually salient local candidate regions and produces zoomed crops to support downstream color identification of a referenced object or clothing item.
applicability_conditions: Use this tool for direct-attribute multiple-choice questions in the vstar_direct_attributes family when the answer depends on the color of a specific visible object, accessory, or clothing region and the main difficulty is localizing the relevant small region first. It is appropriate on raw images or prior artifacts when a person-associated item (for example a handbag, shirt, hat, or similar local region) may be small, off-center, or mixed into cluttered backgrounds, and a generic localized focus view is needed before judging color.
